articles.title: The Lakers' next transaction cycles and how they can keep improving through '28
articles.original_title: The Lakers' next transaction cycles and how they can keep improving through '28
articles.summary: So, like many people, I was a little shell shocked by our offseason at first. We unloaded all of our ammunition (cap space, draft capital) to get our core trio (Luka/ Reaves/ Kessler) and to get two guys who seem best as 6th and 7th men (Grimes/ Mamu). Sexton is notably on a 1+1 which means the Lakers don't view him in the same way.
